tuning: E A D G B E
content:
September Morn - Neil Diamond
(Neil Diamond and Gilbert Becaud)
1979 Stonebridge Music (ASCAP)

INTRO:
[ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch]  [ch]Db[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]

VERSE 1:
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]              [ch]Ab-5[/ch] (4565x0)
Stay for just a while[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                        [ch]Cm7[/ch]
Stay, and let me look at you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                          [ch]Bb7[/ch]
It's been so long, I hardly knew you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]
Standing in the door[/tab]
[tab][ch]Abm[/ch]                 [ch]Db7[/ch]
Stay with me a while[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Gb[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]
I only wanna talk to you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Abm[/ch]                              [ch]Adim7[/ch]
We've traveled halfway 'round the world[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bb7sus4[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]  (ritard)
To find ourselves again[/tab]

CHORUS:
[tab]          [ch]Eb[/ch]
September morn[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bbm7[/ch]                  [ch]Eb7[/ch]                   [ch]Ab[/ch]
We danced until the night became a brand new day[/tab]
[tab][ch]Abm[/ch]                [ch]Db7[/ch]                       [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]Cm[/ch]
Two lovers playing scenes from some romantic play[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Fm[/ch]                [ch]Bb[/ch]                [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]Cm[/ch]
September morning still can make me feel that way[/tab]

VERSE 2:
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                  [ch]Ab-5[/ch]
Look at what you've done[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                            [ch]Cm7[/ch]
Why, you've become a grown-up girl[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                     [ch]Bb7[/ch]
I still can hear you crying[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]
In a corner of your room[/tab]
[tab][ch]Abm[/ch]                     [ch]Db7[/ch]
And look how far we've come[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Gb[/ch]                        [ch]B[/ch]
So far from where we used to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]Abm[/ch]                              [ch]Adim7[/ch]
But not so far that we've forgotten[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bb7sus4[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]
How it was before[/tab]

CHORUS:
[tab]          [ch]Eb[/ch]
September morn[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bbm7[/ch]             [ch]Eb7[/ch]             [ch]Ab[/ch]
Do you remember how we danced that night away?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Abm[/ch]                [ch]Db7[/ch]                       [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]Cm[/ch]
Two lovers playing scenes from some romantic play[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Fm[/ch]                [ch]Bb[/ch]                [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]Cm[/ch]
September morning still can make me feel that way[/tab]

SOLO:
[ch]Abm[/ch]  [ch]Db7[/ch]  [ch]Gb[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]Abm[/ch]  [ch]Abdim7[/ch]  [ch]Bb7sus4[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  (ritard)

REPEAT CHORUS (In F):
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]
September morn[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]
We danced until the night became a brand new day[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]                [ch]Eb7[/ch]                       [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]
Two lovers playing scenes from some romantic play[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Gm[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]
September morning still can make me feel that way[/tab]

[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
Sep-tem-ber morn[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]
We danced until the night became a brand new day[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]                [ch]Eb7[/ch]                       [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]
Two lovers playing scenes from some romantic play[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Gm[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]
September morning still can make me feel that way[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Gm[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]
September morning still can make me feel that way[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Gm[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
September morning still can make me feel...[/tab]

OUTRO:
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch]  [ch]Db[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
...that way[/tab]
